theory.canonical_statement: ID5789 records Master Energy Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\TuTsybolicGlossary.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $] \textbf{The Master Hamiltonian.} The total energy operator of the unified system, comprising the tunneling, superconducting, and cymatic interaction terms. \[ H_{Trawin} = H_{tunnel} + H_{ER} + H_{SC} + H_{cymatic} + H_{TZP} \] \item[$
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
$] \textbf{The Master Hamiltonian.} The total energy operator of the unified system, comprising the tunneling, superconducting, and cymatic interaction terms. \[ H_{Trawin} = H_{tunnel} + H_{ER} + H_{SC} + H_{cymatic} + H_{TZP} \] \item[$
\]
